message:
🐛 Add missing cards to CARD_CATALOG in AddCardModal (#304)

The CARD_CATALOG in AddCardModal.tsx is a separate hardcoded list
independent of cardRegistry.ts. Five registered cards were missing:
- provider_health (Cluster Health category)
- event_summary, warning_events, recent_events (Security & Events)
- pod_crosser (Arcade)

Also adds provider health to AI suggestion queries.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
